rule_metadata.name: ft_rar
rule_metadata.author: James Ferrer
rule_metadata.desc: File type signature for basic .rar files

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_rar
{
	meta:
		author = "James Ferrer"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20150107"
		desc = "File type signature for basic .rar files"

	strings:
		$Rar = {52 61 72 21 1A 07}

	condition:
		$Rar at 0
}
